company.raw_notes: The homepage content provided is entirely default WordPress boilerplate — 'Hello world! Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!' — plus Lorem Ipsum fragments. There is zero first-party content describing what Natan IT Solutions actually does. No business description, service listing, team page, about page, or any other meaningful content was found. Searches for 'Natan IT Solutions' and 'natanitsolutions.com' returned only unrelated companies with similar names (natitsolutions.com, natitsolution.com, nat-solutions.com, etc.) — none of these are the same entity as the signup.
